focus.title: 今日要览：4 个类目共 20 条更新
focus.body:
【AI 最新信息】The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
【金融新闻】2026雄安国际智慧城市创新技术大赛决赛举办
【中国新闻】法国6月下旬热浪期间超额死亡人数突破2000例
【世界新闻】Anguished families left to identify Venezuela quake victims at makeshift morgue

items.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
items.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might en

items.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
items.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
items.summary: At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

items.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
items.summary: Just for kicks, I took a look at Jersey Mike's IPO documents. Surely a sandwich shop would have no need to mention AI. But lo and behold.

items.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
items.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.

items.title: 2026雄安国际智慧城市创新技术大赛决赛举办
items.summary: 中新网雄安7月3日电 (李玉素 韩冰)3日，第三届雄安未来之城场景汇系列大赛之一的2026雄安国际智慧城市创新技术大赛决赛在雄安未来之城场景汇科创园举办。

items.title: 行业人士共话重庆产融发展：从产业底座到生态闭环
items.summary: 中新网重庆7月3日电 (张旭)7月3日，金融支持重庆高质量发展大会在渝举行，多位全国知名金融投资机构负责人、产业领军人物齐聚现场。

items.title: 梧州六堡茶溯源体系正式启用
items.summary: 中新网广西梧州7月3日电 (张广权 肖景凤)7月3日，梧州六堡茶溯源体系启用新闻发布会在广西梧州市举办，正式宣布梧州六堡茶溯源平台建成上线并投入运行，标志着梧州六堡茶质量监管迈入数字化、法治化、智能化新阶段。

items.title: 云南巧家夏季草莓“锁鲜”出海
items.summary: 中新网昭通7月3日电 (罗婕)近日，地处云南省金沙江干热河谷地带的巧家县草莓开始进入丰产期。通过冷链加工中心，一颗颗新鲜草莓经零下40摄氏度急冻、24小时真空冻干后，变身冻干草莓，发往中国各地，并出口美国、德国、英国等海外市场。

items.title: 市场规模预计超3000亿元，工业旅游如何长效发展？
items.summary: 近年来，工业旅游在全国各地蓬勃兴起，众多工业遗存与工业厂区变身为创意园区、博物馆等文化新空间，一批大国重器成为热门旅游目的地。前不久，七部门联合印发《关于弘扬工业文化 保护工业遗产 发展工业旅游的通知》(以下简称《通知》)，为行业擘画了清晰路径。

items.title: 法国6月下旬热浪期间超额死亡人数突破2000例
items.summary: 中新社巴黎7月3日电 (李洋 孙羽婷)法国公共卫生署当地时间3日通报称，在6月下旬的热浪影响下，6月22日至28日法国官方记录的死亡病例数较前一周增加近三成，超额死亡人数突破2000例。

items.title: 英意日共同出资46亿英镑推进新一代战机研发项目
items.summary: 中新社伦敦7月3日电 (记者 欧阳开宇)英国国防部3日发布消息称，英国、意大利、日本三国达成重要合作协议，共同出资46亿英镑推进新一代战机研发项目，相关合同已正式签署，标志这款六代机研发工作迈入关键设计阶段。

items.title: 委内瑞拉地震死亡人数升至2645人
items.summary: 当地时间3日，委内瑞拉通讯部通报称，地震造成的死亡人数上升至2645人，受伤人数上升至12666人，另有6462人获救。地震还导致1074座建筑不同程度受损，15050人流离失所。(总台记者 马天静 宫祥诚)

items.title: 普京称俄军完成对卢甘斯克地区的全部控制
items.summary: 克里姆林宫3日发布消息称，俄罗斯总统普京当天视察俄军联合部队某指挥所并召集会议听取了俄武装力量总参谋长和特别军事行动各部队指挥官的汇报。普京在会议上表示，俄军近期完成了对卢甘斯克地区的全部控制。

items.title: 《习近平谈治国理政》第五卷中斯读者会在斯里兰卡首都科伦坡举行
items.summary: 新华社科伦坡7月3日电(记者吴子钰 车宏亮)《习近平谈治国理政》第五卷中斯读者会3日在斯里兰卡首都科伦坡举行。

items.title: Anguished families left to identify Venezuela quake victims at makeshift morgue
items.summary: The disaster has overwhelmed local services, with bodies put outside or in tents for identification.

items.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.summary: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.

items.title: Polish PM warns critical months ahead in face of Russian threat
items.summary: Tusk says Poland is preparing for "various" scenarios after media reports of a planned Russian attack.

items.title: Zuma showing South Africa 'middle finger' by meeting Gupta brother - minister
items.summary: Former President Zuma's trip to India reignites anger over a decade-old corruption scandal.

items.title: Dissident Hong Kong bookseller Lam Wing-kee dies aged 70
items.summary: Lam Wing-kee, who defied China by selling material critical of Beijing, passed away after suffering from lung cancer.

items.title: Krishnagangwal/CS-Fundamentals（⭐ 1509）
items.summary: Curated CS fundamentals for placement prep: DSA,Computer Networks, DBMS & SQL, OOPs, Operating Systems, System Design & Software Engineering

items.title: mekos2772/ios-location-spoofer（⭐ 1248）
items.summary: Standalone iOS app to spoof GPS location without jailbreak. Includes Shadowrocket/Surge/Loon/QX/Stash module.

items.title: Kulaxyz/self-learning-skills（⭐ 792）
items.summary: A self-improving skill for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, AGENTS.md): recognize a hard-won golden path in a session and harvest it into a reusable skill/rule for next time.

items.title: diinki/linux-antiquity（⭐ 565）
items.summary: A highly tasteful Linux-theme, reminiscent of art-nouveau and old drawings related to astronomy, science, and mythology.
